name: update_note
description: Update an existing Google Keep note. Can change title, text, pin status, and manage checklist items.

note_id.description: The ID of the note to update.

text.description: New text body for text notes. Replaces the existing text entirely.

pinned.description: Whether the note should be pinned.

add_items.description: Newline-separated items to append to a checklist note.

check_items.description: Newline-separated item texts to mark as checked in a checklist note.

uncheck_items.description: Newline-separated item texts to mark as unchecked in a checklist note.

delete_items.description: Newline-separated item texts to remove from a checklist note.
